interactions.message: Potential interaction: Valproic Acid may increase risk of toxicity / adverse effects when combined with Temozolomide (demo rule). Consider alternative anticonvulsant or enhanced monitoring.
suggestions: Switch anticonvulsant (demo): consider Levetiracetam instead of Valproic Acid
Lower Temozolomide dose and add monitoring
Proceed only with explicit override note

interactions.message: Allergy conflict: patient has documented Aspirin allergy (demo). Remove Aspirin from order.
